titles.title: Forever I Will Sing in Praise

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I see the sky, the clouds, the sun, I see You When I feel the gentle breeze that soothes me now I know, Lord, that You are there Embracing me in Your arms Your love, I feel

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Every time I seek Your presence in my life You have always found a way to make me feel so loved Oh, my Lord, I thirst for You My soul yearns to be with You My whole life, I surrender

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Forever, I will sing in praise To proclaim to all Your goodness Until the end, my life, I offer As a pleasing sacrifice To You, my God You are my King, my source of strength My Lord, my God You are my King forevermore I would keep on praising Your name Sing to the world Your goodness My God, my Lord, my King

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When I hear the echo of your voice inside me Leading me in every way that I should take I know, God, that You are there Forever, You will be That's why I stand before You now To lift Your blessed name

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I would keep on praising Your name Sing to the world Your goodness My God, my Lord, my King
